Meta.title: KazMedSim — clinical simulator
Meta.description: Clinical reasoning practice with synthetic cases

Landing.introTitle: One platform for doctors and patients
Landing.introText: KazMedSim is a clinical consultation simulator for practicing doctor skills, plus a patient portal for accessing your encounter history by IIN. Choose your role to continue.
Landing.title: Clinical reasoning starts before the right answer.
Landing.lead: Run a virtual consultation: take a history, select investigations, build a differential and review every decision.
Landing.heroTitle: Clinical reasoning starts before the right answer.
Landing.heroSubtitle: Run a virtual consultation: take a history, select investigations, build a differential and review every decision.
Landing.dialogue: The patient reveals only what you ask.
Landing.clinical: Examination, tests and diagnosis stay in one flow.
Landing.rubric: Debrief scores eight competencies, not one percentage.
Landing.howTitle: One consultation, the complete clinical cycle
Landing.safetyTitle: A simulator, not a diagnostic service
Landing.safety: All patients and histories are synthetic. Educational content does not replace clinicians, guidelines or emergency care.
Landing.nameMinMax: Name must be between 2 and 40 characters
Landing.modeTrainingDesc: Virtual patients, clinical scenarios, and debriefing.
Landing.modeAiDesc: Clinical query analysis and medical RAG search.
Landing.disclaimer: KazMedSim is strictly for educational purposes. The AI Assistant does not replace a qualified physician or clinical guidelines.

Onboarding.step1Desc: Ask open-ended and targeted questions. Remember: patients reveal facts only when asked relevant questions.
Onboarding.step1Q1: What exactly is bothering you and when did it start?
Onboarding.step1Q2: Do you have any drug allergies?
Onboarding.step1PatientResponse: Chest pain started 2 hours ago, radiating to my left arm.
Onboarding.step2Desc: Assess vital signs (HR, BP, SpO₂) and perform auscultation or palpation.
Onboarding.step2Result: Auscultation: vesicular breath sounds, no rales.
Onboarding.step3Desc: Select only justified diagnostics. Every unnecessary test increases educational cost and lowers your score.
Onboarding.step3Explanation: 12-lead ECG is critical for chest pain, while abdominal CT is not indicated at this stage.
Onboarding.step4Desc: KazMedSim evaluates 8 core competencies: from communication to red flag detection.

Auth.title: Your demo workspace
Auth.lead: Enter a learning name. Do not enter real patient information.
Auth.name: How should we address you?
Auth.privacy: The profile is stored only in this browser.

PatientPortal.hubLead: Choose a role to continue. This is lightweight, password-free identification — not intended to protect real personal data.
PatientPortal.doctorCardLead: Access STT recording, the RAG assistant, and the dashboard.
PatientPortal.doctorLead: Enter your name — we'll find or create your doctor record.
PatientPortal.patientLead: We'll find your record by your individual identification number.
PatientPortal.demoNotice: Demo mode: this is lightweight, password-free identification — not for real patient data.
PatientPortal.profileEmptyLead: There are no diagnoses, referrals or certificates for your IIN yet. They will appear here after a visit to a doctor.
PatientPortal.sectionReferralsEmpty: No referrals or ordered investigations yet.
PatientPortal.assistantCtaLead: Describe what bothers you and get a preparation checklist plus questions for your doctor.

Catalog.title: Choose a clinical case
Catalog.lead: Start with the complaint. Ground truth appears only after completion.
Catalog.resetProgressConfirm: Reset all training progress? This cannot be undone.

quickItems: What other symptoms do you have?
Training.thinking: The patient is considering the question…
Training.historyEmpty: Start with an open question about the complaint.
Training.managementPlaceholder: Disposition, measures, follow-up and red flags…
Training.medicationWarning: Medication and doses are an educational draft. Validate the source.
Training.finishHint: Ground truth and rubric unlock after completion.

Debrief.title: Clinical debrief
Debrief.safetyWarning: Critical safety issues detected despite high score
Debrief.celebrationSafe: All critical risks and red flags were successfully identified.
Debrief.emptyDescription: Debrief data not found for this case.

Dashboard.title: Clinical learning trajectory
Dashboard.subtitle: Your personal analytics from clinical simulator sessions.
Dashboard.emptyDescription: Complete your first clinical simulation to see your progress analytics here.

Builder.title: Synthetic case builder
Builder.notice: Development/demo only. Export does not publish the case.

DoctorDashboard.title: My patients
DoctorDashboard.lead: Patients whose encounters you have saved.
DoctorDashboard.emptyLead: Record an encounter in STT and save the protocol using the patient's IIN.

AI.title: Clinical AI Assistant
AI.subtitle: Decision support & RAG search
AI.ragBadgeProtocolWithTime: Answer grounded in clinical protocols (RAG). Processing time: {seconds}s
AI.ragBadgeGenerated: Answer generated by the model without protocols.

PatientAssistant.title: Prepare for your visit
PatientAssistant.lead: Describe what is bothering you. The assistant will suggest what to bring, what to measure and which questions to ask your doctor. This is not a diagnosis — it helps you arrive prepared.
PatientAssistant.inputPlaceholder: For example: my head has been aching in the afternoon for three days, it gets worse by the evening. This never happened before.
PatientAssistant.durationHint: Searching the clinical protocols can take up to a minute.
PatientAssistant.loadingTitle: Looking through the protocols and putting your notes together…
PatientAssistant.emergencyText: Your description contains signs that mean you should call 103 now or go to the emergency department. Do not wait for a scheduled visit.
PatientAssistant.directionsTitle: What the doctor will look at
PatientAssistant.prepareTitle: What to bring to the visit
PatientAssistant.measureTitle: What to measure and write down
PatientAssistant.errorGeneric: Could not prepare your notes. Please try again.
PatientAssistant.errorAuth: Your session expired. Please sign in to the portal again.
